title: sonchus arvensis subsp. arenicola
intro: Sonchus arvensis subsp. arenicola, also known as dune sowthistle, is a plant subspecies of the genus Sonchus that is native to coastal areas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of dune sowthistle include the potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and even exhibit anticancer properties. Dune sowthistle is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
